description.intro:
Stand behind the reigning Serie A champions as they set their sights on European glory in the Nike Inter Milan 26/27 Dri-FIT Stadium Home Shirt in Lyon Blue/Black/University Gold, a comfortable home jersey that embodies Nerazzurri pride.

Based on the kits worn by Lautaro Martinez, Nicolo Barella, Marcus Thuram, Hakan Calhanoglu, Pio Esposito and the rest of a star-studded squad at the pinnacle of club football, the 2026/27 home shirt shows your support for Il Biscione as they fight to win another Scudetto and aim for a fourth UEFA Champions League title. Those iconic black and blue stripes combine with a timeless polo collar to create a heritage look that evokes the kits of the 90s and 00s, while subtle zig-zag detailing adds a modern touch, and the legendary Inter crest emblazoned across the heart displays your passion for the world to see.

The ultra-lightweight, flexible construction provides full freedom of movement, so you can sprint across the turf, slide into tackles and leap into aerial challenges without restriction. Breathable, sweat-wicking Dri-FIT performance fabric promotes airflow, absorbs moisture and dries quickly to keep you cool, dry and comfortable as you push past your limits, whether you're straining to hit a new personal best in the gym, honing your technique in training, fighting to win every duel on the pitch or wildly celebrating a crucial goal in the stands of the San Siro.
description.subtitle: Inter Milan 2026-2027 Nike Home Shirt - Blue, Black

technical_details.adjustment: Nike Dri-FIT: Manages moisture to provide coolness and comfort.

name: Nike Inter Milan 26/27 Dri-FIT Stadium Home Shirt
